ddls:
CREATE TABLE "photographers" (
  "photographer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photographer */,
  "fname" TEXT /* First name of the photographer */,
  "lname" TEXT /* Last name of the photographer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the photographer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the photographer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the photographer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the photographer */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the photographer belongs to */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area the photographer serves */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the photographer's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief bio or description of the photographer */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the photographer's personal website */,
  "portfolio_url" TEXT /* URL of the photographer's portfolio */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the photographer (e.g., days of the week, hours) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the photographer's profile picture */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Status of the photographer's identity verification (e.g., verified, unverified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photographer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the area belongs to */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the area belongs to */,
  "pincode" TEXT /* Pincode of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "photographer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the photographer who uploaded the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., portrait, landscape) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the image is featured in the portfolio */,
  "tags" TEXT /* JSON array of tags for the image (e.g., ["wedding", "outdoor", "black-and-white"]) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_photographer_id FOREIGN KEY ("photographer_id") REFERENCES photographers ("photographer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media profile */,
  "photographer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the photographer who owns the profile */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Instagram) */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL of the social media profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_photographer_id FOREIGN KEY ("photographer_id") REFERENCES photographers ("photographer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Complete address of the client */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the client's profile picture */,
  "preferred_photographer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client's preferred photographer (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who made the booking */,
  "photographer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the photographer who was booked */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., wedding, portrait session) */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_duration_hours" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in hours */,
  "additional_requirements" TEXT /* Any additional requirements or notes from the client */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., pending, confirmed, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_photographer_id FOREIGN KEY ("photographer_id") REFERENCES photographers ("photographer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking the review is for */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the client (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text left by the client */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client who left the review (for display purposes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "photographer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the photographer who received the rating */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given to the photographer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_photographer_id FOREIGN KEY ("photographer_id") REFERENCES photographers ("photographer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the admin */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the admin account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin (e.g., superadmin, manager) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the admin's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target (e.g., photographer_id, client_id) the action is related to */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_actions_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient (photographer or client) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., booking, review) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text message of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES photographers ("photographer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)
